tagline.line1: No ads. No investors. No agenda.
tagline.line2: Free at the base tier, forever.

footer.privacy: Photos are encrypted at rest and never used to train any model. Face recognition runs on your library only. Plus is the only paid tier; the base experience is free forever.

banner.regionAria: Add HivePhoto to your home screen
banner.home: Add HivePhoto to your home screen for one-tap upload + search. Free, no signup beyond Clerk auth. Photos stay private — no ads, no model training, no resale.

firstVisit.body: Upload, search, understand your photos. Faces, places, semantic search, duplicates — all in your private library.
